G1.name: Governance
G1.text: policy, role, provenance, and ticket controls are non-negotiable

G2.name: Quality
G2.text: correctness, testability, and engineering value are governance-enforced Requires: TDD/EDD coverage floor (>=80%), functional-first design, measurable acceptance criteria, and passing lint/type checks before merge

G3.name: Zero Cost
G3.text: prefer local/fleet/free lanes before paid providers

G4.name: Privacy & Security
G4.text: sensitive context stays local unless explicit override exists; secrets never in git, env vars, or logs; least-privilege tokens enforced; supply-chain dependencies pinned; agent-consumed inputs sanitised against injection

G5.name: Portability
G5.text: avoid user-specific coupling; settings-driven behavior preferred

G6.name: Resilience
G6.text: graceful degradation and fallback paths for partial outages

G7.name: Throughput
G7.text: acceptable speed after higher-priority goals are satisfied

G8.name: Observability
G8.text: decisions and outcomes are visible, auditable, and attributable

G9.name: Interoperability
G9.text: preserve compatibility across agent surfaces and runtimes

G10.name: Maintainability
G10.text: files <=100 lines; cyclomatic complexity <=10 per function; no dead code at merge; changes documented via GOV-009 EDD before implementation

notes: GENERATED — do not edit. Regenerate via `npm run goals:regen`.
Markdown source is canonical; JSON is a derived view for linting/automation.
